evidence.snippet: We offer fast & flexible integrated mission solutions for fixed-wing, rotary-wing aircraft and unmanned aerial vehicles to help our clients achieve their various important & special missions be it Search & Rescue, Aerial Surveying, Airborne Law Enforcement, Maritime Patrol or even Intelligence, Surveillance & Reconnaissance operations.
With our Mission System Airborne LINX, we connect all sensors and communication systems on board any aircraft for maximum mission control.

items.notes: Airborne LINX mission management system and SCAR-Pod sensor pods are core ISR/surveillance products for manned aircraft and UAVs

evidence.snippet:
*   Carbon Fibre Parts & Milling

Scope of Work:
Manufacture and assembly of wiring harnesses, electrical and electronic equipment, structural and non-structural parts and appliances from carbon fibre-reinforced plastic, metal and other materials, based on approved and non-approved design data.

items.notes: In-house production of carbon fibre parts, radomes, and structural components
Camera lifts and brackets as named product lines

products_categories.notes: Company primarily serves manned aircraft but explicitly includes UAVs. Product mix spans ISR mission systems, structural parts, and mechanical accessories.

evidence.snippet: We are your One-Stop-Shop for Integration & Modification Excellence
We design, integrate and certify state-of-the-art special mission equipment and systems into new & existing airframes.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Primary business is converting aircraft (including UAVs) into special mission platforms via design, integration, and EASA certification. Also sells proprietary hardware (SCAR-Pods, Airborne LINX) as part of integration offerings.

evidence.snippet:
Airborne Linx
-------------
[Connect & Control](#connect-control) [Installation Your Way](#installation-your-way) [Core Components](#core-components) [System Architecture](#system-architecture)
With our Mission System Airborne LINX, we connect all sensors and communication systems on board any aircraft for maximum mission control.

The Human Machine Interface is the Mission Management Unit (MMU), allowing the operator to control the entire LINX architecture on a simple-to-use touchscreen. Embedded either in an ergonomic workstation or on a tablet, the MMU leads the field in simplifying the management of any combination of sensors.

items.name: Radomes
items.product_type: custom radomes for airborne antenna systems

items.name: CLEAR VIEW Exhaust Deflector Kit
items.product_type: certified exhaust gas deflection kit for Cessna 208B Caravan

evidence.snippet: The CLEAR VIEW Exhaust Deflector Kit is a fully certified solution designed to eliminate heat distortion in airborne imaging. Specifically engineered for the Cessna 208B Caravan and certified under EASA STC-AT-188, this innovative system ensures crystal-clear imagery for surveillance, reconnaissance and mapping missions.

tagline: Austrian integrator of ISR payloads and mission systems for manned aircraft. Core products: SCAR-Pod family (EO/IR, RADAR, ViDAR variants), Airborne LINX architecture, Mission Management Unit, and airborne workstations. EASA-certified for design and installation; A400M program partner announced 2026. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence of US/allied adoption limited; primarily European market presence evident.
